_about: Auth-gated routes (/items/new, /messages, /settings/*) are intentionally NOT audited here — Lighthouse runs headless without session cookies and would just measure the OIDC redirect. Wiring puppeteerScript + a test user in Authentik + GitHub Actions secrets is a separate follow-up; see docs/features/2026-05-16_lighthouse-ci-public-routes.md. /items/<id> is pinned to a stable production listing; if that listing is deleted, update the URL or rotate to another.
